changelog.label: Baseline — Swing Walls + 4-Token Trading
changes: RANGE_BOUNCE: detect walls from swing clusters, not absolute max/min
Wall-only entries — no mid-range, strict 0.3% tolerance
Per-symbol daily trade limits — all 4 coins trade independently
Remove daily trade count cap — trade on valid signals only
Kronos + AI scanner limited to BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT/BNBUSDT
Token pool seeding: only on first boot, not on every restart
Exhaustive 24/7 optimizer (genetic search) added — runs in background
Fix: all strategies run 24/7 — session gate changed from hard block to score bonus
Fix: EMA200 bias changed from hard block to score penalty
Fix: RSI hard block raised to RSI>78 long / RSI<22 short
